title: Automatic Twin Head Pipe Boring Machine preliminary quotation
machineName: Automatic Twin Head Pipe Boring Machine
intro: Dear Sir, please find below our preliminary quotation for the Automatic Twin Head Pipe Boring Machine. Welden Industries offers the machine complete with tool-heads and multiple tools for simultaneous facing and boring of both ends of the idler pipe.
scopeItems: WELDMAN make Automatic Twin Head Idler Pipe Boring Machine
Automatic twin-head boring and facing on both ends of the idler pipe
A set of tool holders with tools is supplied with the machine
Hydraulic power pack included
Catalogue and sample video of the machine are enclosed herewith
exclusions: Hydraulic oil and cutting oil are not in our scope of supply
Any civil work including foundation and foundation nut-bolts are not in our scope of supply
Food, lodging and local conveyance for Welden technicians are to be paid by the customer
Foundation nuts and bolts, if required, are not in our scope of supply
deliveryNote: 10 weeks from the date of receipt of your techno-commercially clear order along with the advance.
installationNote: Our people will visit your works for supervision of erection, commissioning and training of your operator. Food, lodging and local conveyance from the place of their stay to your site and back for our technicians are to be paid by you.
warrantyNote: 18 months from the date of delivery or 12 months from the date of commissioning, whichever is earlier, against any manufacturing defect.
paymentTerms: 40% of the basic order value advance along with the order and balance 60% of the basic order value along with 100% GST amount to be paid after inspection at our works, against proforma invoice before delivery.
validityNote: Our offer is open for acceptance up to 45 days from the date of our offer. This preliminary quotation is subject to technical and commercial confirmation.
termsAndConditions: Price quoted is on Ex. Works Kolkata basis and exclusive of GST, which will be charged extra as applicable at the time of delivery.
Packing and forwarding extra at 2.5%.
Transit insurance to client's account.
GST extra as applicable at the time of delivery. Present rate 18%.
GSTIN No.: 19AAACW4205C1ZQ.
Suitable for conveyor tube/pipe having diameter of 76 mm to 200 mm and length of 200 mm to 2200 mm by using two vices.
Standard machine is suitable for boring depth of 10 mm. Longer boring length can be supplied at nominal extra cost.
Input supply 415V, 3 phase, 4-wire, 50 Hz AC with PLC sequence and HMI-assisted boring and facing operation.
Bank: ICICI Bank Ltd., Kolkata-Mahamayatala Branch, Account No. 266505500258, IFSC ICIC0002665, MICR 700229143.
footerNote: We hope you will find our offer quite attractive and shall favour us with your valued order at your earliest. Subject to technical and commercial confirmation by Welden Industries.
technicalSpecifications: Input Supply: 415V, 3 Phase, 4-Wire, 50 Hz AC
Machining Operation: By 2 nos. 5 HP Motors, one for each head
No. of Tools for each Head: 03 nos. (Total 6 tools in operation)
Hydraulic Power Pack: 2 HP motor coupled to gear pump, manifold and solenoid valve
Clamping-Declamping: By 02 special vices operated by hydraulic motor
Boring and Facing: With 02 stepper motors and HMI
Cooling: Close circuit system with distilled water and coolant in 1:10 ratio
generalNotes: Suitable for conveyor tube/pipe diameter 76 mm to 200 mm and length 200 mm to 2200 mm by using two vices.
Standard machine is suitable for a boring depth of 10 mm. Longer boring length can be supplied at nominal extra cost.
Hydraulic power pack will be supplied. Hydraulic oil and cutting oil are not in our scope of supply.
We will provide the drawing in advance to undertake the civil work beforehand to avoid delay in commissioning.
bankDetails: Address: 449, N. S. C. Bose Road, Kolkata-700103

01 no. welding fixture for holding and rotating the job at predetermined speed for automatic both-side disc-end welding
02 sets WELDMAN Semi-Automatic CO2 Welding Machines with 400A inverter based MIG/MAG/CO2 power source, wire feeder, torch, regulator, heater and welding accessories
02 nos. stands for mounting of the wire feeders
Control panel and pendent for automatic welding sequence and overlap
exclusions: Any foundation work or civil work is not in our scope of supply

warrantyNote: 18 months from the date of delivery or 12 months from the date of commissioning, whichever is earlier, against any manufacturing defect.
paymentTerms: 40% of the basic order value advance along with the order and balance 60% of the basic order value along with 100% GST amount to be paid after inspection at our works, against proforma invoice before delivery.

termsAndConditions: Price quoted is on Ex. Works Kolkata basis and exclusive of GST, which will be charged extra as applicable at the time of delivery.
Packing and forwarding extra at 2.5%.
Transit insurance to client's account.
GST extra as applicable at the time of delivery. Present rate 18%.
GSTIN No.: 19AAACW4205C1ZQ.
Minimum diameter 76 mm, maximum diameter 200 mm, minimum length 200 mm, maximum length 2200 mm.

footerNote: We hope you will find our offer quite attractive and shall favour us with your valued order at your earliest. Subject to technical and commercial confirmation by Welden Industries.
technicalSpecifications: Minimum diameter: 76 mm
Maximum diameter: 200 mm
Minimum length: 200 mm
Maximum length: 2200 mm
02 sets WELDMAN Semi-Automatic CO2 Welding Machines included
PLC-controlled sequence for automatic welding and overlap
generalNotes: Fixture supplied complete with control panel, interconnection cable and 02 stands for mounting of wire feeders.
Loading and unloading of the job is manual, and clamping is done with the hand wheel on the tailstock.
Once the Start push button is pressed, welding starts and the job rotates; after overlap the welding stops automatically.
Our people will visit your works for supervision of erection, commissioning and training of your operator.
